flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Luna Community College fell 40% between 2006 and 2009 (25.0% → 15.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Luna Community College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.1k → $1.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Luna Community College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (62.3% → 43.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Luna Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.7k → $3.4k).
